title: extra position show
description: This is an extended version of position show. Show various different things on your screen with a total of 1 keybind.
body:
![All the features activated at once](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/E5NQL52f/images/d2b92c03aa6be836f1c1612000fd68d9c23aa236_350.webp)


This mod is a clientside mod that shows you various things on your screen without any serverside mod or plugin needed. Extended version of [position show](https://modrinth.com/mod/position-show)
## FEATURES VERSION 1.0.1:
- fps
- player position
- player orientation
- camera position
- camera orientation
- position in chunk
- chunk position
- server player count
- players in render distance
- entities in render distance


## WHY YOU SHOULD DOWNLOAD THIS MOD
This mod can be used for many different things, all the way from getting your fps to knowing if your friends are near to steal there stuff.
